services.name: Custom Website Design & Hosting
services.blurb: A fast, professional website we design, build, and host for you — one you actually own. You look like the established, trustworthy choice the moment someone finds you, so more of the people already searching for you actually pick up the phone.
services.great_for: Home services, restaurants, medical/dental, legal, auto, salons

services.name: Local SEO & Google Business Profile
services.blurb: Getting your business to show up at the top when nearby customers search for what you do. You become the obvious first choice for people in your area who are ready to buy right now — steady calls and walk-ins instead of hoping word-of-mouth carries you.
services.great_for: Home services, restaurants, retail, auto, salons, medical/dental

You stay on top of the business in two minutes a day, catch trouble early, and never get blindsided at month-end.
services.great_for: Busy owners who never find time to check the books

services.name: Expense Management & Receipt Capture
services.blurb: Snap a photo of any receipt and it's captured, categorized, and logged automatically. Top Shelf sets up mobile receipt capture that reads, sorts, and files each expense to the right category the moment you snap it. Every deduction is captured, tax time is a non-event, and you stop paying more tax than you owe.
services.great_for: Owners with receipts scattered across the truck and wallet

services.name: Budgeting & Cash-Flow Forecasting
services.blurb: A forward look at your money, what's coming in, what's going out, and whether you'll be short before it happens. Top Shelf builds a living forecast that projects cash weeks and months ahead, flags tight spots early, and sets budgets you can actually hold to. You see the cash crunch coming with time to act, sleep easier, and stop white-knuckling every payroll.
services.great_for: Profitable owners who still stress over making payroll

services.name: Vendor & Purchase-Order Management
services.blurb: A simple system to track what you order, from whom, at what price, and what you actually owe. Top Shelf sets up purchase orders, price tracking, and a clear payables view so every order is matched to what was delivered and what you agreed to pay. You catch overcharges, pay only what you owe, and keep vendors honest without playing detective.
services.great_for: Owners buying from multiple suppliers on trust alone

services.name: Documents & E-Signature
services.blurb: Send contracts, estimates, and forms that customers can sign legally from their phone in seconds. Top Shelf sets up branded documents with legally binding e-signatures customers can complete on any device, with automatic reminders until it's done. Deals close in minutes instead of days, fewer prospects slip away, and you get to work, and paid, faster.
services.great_for: Owners waiting on signed estimates and contracts

services.name: Branded Business Email + Domain
services.blurb: Real email on your own domain (you@yourbusiness.com) with professional inboxes for you and your team. Top Shelf registers and locks down your domain, sets up professional inboxes for your whole team, and configures the behind-the-scenes email security (SPF, DKIM, DMARC) so your messages land in the inbox and impostors can't send as you. You look established and trustworthy in every email, your messages actually get delivered, and you own the domain forever.
services.great_for: Any owner still running the business off a free personal email

services.name: Password & Access Management
services.blurb: A secure vault that stores every business login and controls exactly who on your team can get into what. Top Shelf sets up a company password manager, generates strong unique logins for every account, and puts you in control of granting and instantly revoking access as people come and go. You always know who can access what, offboarding a worker takes one click, and a single leaked password can no longer unravel your whole business.
services.great_for: Any team sharing logins by text, spreadsheet, or memory

services.name: Data Backup & Disaster Recovery
services.blurb: Automatic offsite copies of your critical business data plus a tested plan to get you running again fast if disaster strikes. Top Shelf sets up automatic, encrypted offsite backups of everything that matters and builds a written recovery plan so you can restore your business quickly instead of scrambling in a crisis. Even in a worst-case fire, theft, or attack, your business survives and gets back up in hours instead of closing for good.
services.great_for: Every owner whose customer records and finances live in one place

services.name: Cybersecurity Basics (MFA, phishing training)
services.blurb: The essential protections every small business needs: two-step login on key accounts plus quick training so your team stops clicking bad links. Top Shelf turns on multi-factor authentication across your critical accounts and runs plain-English phishing training so your people can spot and shut down scams before they cost you. A stolen password alone can't get anyone in, your team becomes your first line of defense, and you sleep knowing one bad click won't sink you.
services.great_for: Any business where employees handle email, money, or customer data

services.name: Uptime & Website Monitoring
services.blurb: Around-the-clock watching of your website and online booking so you're alerted the moment anything goes down. Top Shelf monitors your website and booking pages 24/7, alerts you (and us) instantly if they go down or slow to a crawl, and gets them back up fast. You catch outages before your customers do, you stop losing sales to a silent crash, and your storefront stays open around the clock.
services.great_for: Any business that takes orders, bookings, or leads online

services.name: Compliance / License / Insurance Renewal Tracker
services.blurb: A single dashboard that tracks every license, permit, insurance policy, and filing deadline and reminds you well before each one expires. Top Shelf builds you a renewal tracker with every license, insurance policy, and deadline in one place, plus automatic reminders that give you plenty of runway to renew on time. You never get blindsided by an expired license or lapsed policy again, and you stay legal, insured, and out of trouble without keeping it all in your head.
services.great_for: Licensed and insured trades, contractors, and regulated businesses

services.name: Restaurants & Bars
services.blurb: A restaurant-tailored bundle: your own online ordering, table reservations, and a kitchen display system that routes orders straight to the line. Top Shelf specializes the whole build for your restaurant: commission-free online ordering on your own site, a reservation system that fills tables and cuts no-shows, and a kitchen display that puts every order in front of the line clearly and in order. You keep more of every dollar, the rush runs smoother with fewer mistakes, and repeat customers order straight from you instead of a delivery app.
services.great_for: Restaurants and bars

services.name: Medical & Dental
services.blurb: A practice-tailored bundle: digital patient intake, secure HIPAA-conscious messaging, and a patient portal for appointments, forms, and records. Top Shelf specializes the build for your practice: digital intake patients complete before they arrive, secure messaging that keeps health info protected, and a patient portal for self-scheduling, forms, and records with automated appointment reminders. Fewer no-shows and empty chairs, a front desk freed from paperwork, and patient information handled the professional, compliant way.
services.great_for: Medical, dental, and other healthcare practices

services.name: Legal
services.blurb: A firm-tailored bundle: matter management, client intake, document automation, and time tracking with billing built in. Top Shelf specializes the build for your firm: organized matter management, a smooth client intake pipeline, document automation that drafts routine paperwork in minutes, and time-and-billing that captures every billable moment as you work. You recover thousands in billable hours you were quietly losing, cases stay organized, and clients get a polished, responsive experience.
services.great_for: Law firms and solo attorneys

services.name: Retail
services.blurb: A store-tailored bundle: an online store, barcode-driven inventory tracking, and a customer loyalty program that brings shoppers back. Top Shelf specializes the build for your shop: an e-commerce store so you sell beyond your four walls, barcode inventory that stays accurate in real time, and a loyalty program that rewards repeat buyers and pulls them back in. You sell around the clock and beyond your neighborhood, always know what's on the shelf, and turn one-time shoppers into regulars who spend more.
services.great_for: Retail shops and product-based businesses

services.name: Auto
services.blurb: A shop-tailored bundle: digital repair orders, digital vehicle inspections with photos, and a full service history for every customer. Top Shelf specializes the build for your shop: digital repair orders that keep jobs organized, digital vehicle inspections with photos and video texted straight to the customer, and a service history that follows every vehicle. Customers see the problem and approve more work because they trust you, your average ticket climbs, and their full history keeps them coming back to you.
services.great_for: Auto repair shops and service centers

services.name: Salon / Spa / Fitness
services.blurb: A tailored bundle for appointment businesses: online booking for classes and packages, plus memberships and recurring billing. Top Shelf specializes the build for your business: 24/7 online booking for appointments, classes, and packages with automated reminders and prepaid holds to cut no-shows, plus memberships and recurring billing for steady monthly income. Clients book themselves any hour without tying up your staff, no-shows drop, and memberships give you predictable revenue you can actually plan around.
